title: davallia botrychioides var. multifida
intro: Davallia botrychioides var. multifida, also known as the multifidum fern or botrychioides fern, is a type of flowering fern plant native to tropical regions. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Davallia botrychioides var. multifida include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, often used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
